init.description: Define time-of-use tariff windows as JSON. Leave blank to disable per-tariff statistics.

data_description.tariffs: JSON list of objects with: name (string), days (0=Mon–6=Sun), start_hour, end_hour (0–24). Optional: months (1=Jan…12=Dec). Hours not matching any window fall into 'default'. Example: [{"name":"on-peak","days":[0,1,2,3,4],"months":[6,7,8,9],"start_hour":14,"end_hour":19},{"name":"off-peak","days":[0,1,2,3,4,5,6],"start_hour":0,"end_hour":14}]

error.invalid_schema: Schema is invalid — each entry needs a name, days (0-6), start_hour, end_hour
error.bad_hours: start_hour must be less than end_hour, both within 0-24
error.bad_months: months must be a list of integers 1–12
